summary.key_theme: Reddit 股價近期波動劇烈，主要受內部人士拋售、AI 數據價值潛力以及法律監管風險等多重因素交互影響。

bullish.title: Reddit (RDDT) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
bullish.reason: 股價出現顯著上漲，顯示市場對 Reddit 的成長動能與投資價值重新評估，為近期最強勁的正面訊號。

bullish.title: Reddit Starting To Look Straight-Up Attractive At This Price
bullish.reason: 分析師指出 Reddit 獨特的人類生成內容對 AI 開發者與廣告商具有高度價值，基本面吸引力提升。

bearish.title: Why Reddit Shares Are Trending Lower On Thursday? — Reddit (RDDT) stock drops over 8% on Thursday following insider sales by the CTO and COO amid a broader Nasdaq sell-off.
bearish.reason: CTO 與 COO 的內部拋售行為引發市場對公司前景的擔憂，加上 Nasdaq 大盤走弱，導致股價單日重挫超過 8 %。

bearish.title: US Jury Ruling Puts Reddit’s Engagement Model Under New Scrutiny
bearish.reason: 美國陪審團的裁決對 Reddit 的用戶參與模式提出質疑，可能影響其商業模式的合法性與未來營運策略。

bearish.title: Ross Stores Beat Earnings and Gained 68% in a Year. Reddit Is Still Betting Against It.
bearish.reason: 報導提及 Reddit 社群對 Ross Stores 的負面情緒，反映出平台上的投資觀點可能與市場實際表現脫節，對公司品牌形象有潛在負面影響。

neutral.title: Meta, Kodiak Sciences, Unity Software, Lumentum Holdings And Reddit: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
neutral.reason: 僅為市場觀察清單，反映大盤整體下跌背景下 Reddit 的市場關注度，並無針對公司本身的重大基本面變動。

neutral.title: Reddit Shares Climb Wednesday: What's Happening?
neutral.reason: 報導 Reddit 股價隨大盤反彈上漲 4 %，屬於正常的市場波動範疇，缺乏具體的公司層面利多驅動。
